nodes.name: main.py
nodes.summary: Current production pilot. Defines the shared agent(obs) scaffold every file follows. Runs Shun's Palace deck (main_v3_pure lineage).

nodes.name: bare_agent.py
nodes.summary: Generic archetype-agnostic auto-role engine underpinning all pilots. Auto-assigns attacker/support roles without deck-specific knowledge.

nodes.name: bare_agent2.py
nodes.summary: Variant of the bare generic engine.

nodes.name: fire.py
nodes.summary: Anti-Grass Fire aggro counter deck pilot. Exploits main's all-Grass weakness; beats main 74%.

nodes.name: honchkrow.py
nodes.summary: Hidden-win-condition combo pilot. Uses rocket_feathers_damage for precise ammo-discard combo. Beats main ~56%.

nodes.name: main_bench.py
nodes.summary: Bench-management variant branched from main.

nodes.name: main_crustle_base.py
nodes.summary: Crustle dual-line base pilot, branched from main.

nodes.name: main_cur.py
nodes.summary: Current working snapshot pilot.

nodes.name: main_honch_base.py
nodes.summary: Honchkrow base pilot derived from v1, feeding the honchkrow combo line.

nodes.name: main_megalucario_backup.py
nodes.summary: Legacy meta-aware multi-attacker Mega Lucario pilot, since replaced by the v3 line.

nodes.name: main_typh_base.py
nodes.summary: Typhlosion base pilot derived from crustle_base.

nodes.name: main_typhlosion.py
nodes.summary: Crustle/Typhlosion 2-line deck pilot (main_v2 line); strongest untuned generic pilot.

nodes.name: main_v1.py
nodes.summary: First iteration in the main lineage chain.

nodes.name: main_v2.py
nodes.summary: Second iteration; Typhlosion generic engine. Branches to v3, v2_baseline, v2_rebel, typhlosion.

nodes.name: main_v2_baseline.py
nodes.summary: Baseline reference branch of v2.

nodes.name: main_v2_rebel.py
nodes.summary: Experimental rebel branch of v2.

nodes.name: main_v3.py
nodes.summary: Full overlay pilot building on v2; defines _buddy_blast_damage helper. Archetype overlays regress the gauntlet.

nodes.name: main_v3_pure.py
nodes.summary: v2 generic engine plus ONLY the Buddy Blast damage-correction fix. Strongest pilot, 83.2% gauntlet.

nodes.name: main_v4.py
nodes.summary: Fourth iteration in the buddy-blast damage-correction series, building on v3.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Python package marker making the agents directory importable.

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Tooling ignore config for the understand-anything analyzer.

nodes.name: rocket_feathers_damage
nodes.summary: Helper computing the precise ammo-discard combo damage for the Honchkrow hidden win condition.

nodes.name: _buddy_blast_damage
nodes.summary: Helper computing real Buddy Blast damage (40+60 if Ethan's in discard); a fact the engine cannot read otherwise.

layers.name: Generic Engine & Baselines
layers.description: Archetype-agnostic auto-role engines and their iterations

layers.name: Buddy Blast Damage-Correction Series (v3-v4)
layers.description: Ablation series adding the Buddy Blast damage fix
